debug_info.goal:
α : Type
s : Skeleton
leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s
f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree) =
    InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s leaf_data_tree fun left right => @f (left, right)

failed_attempts:
induction' s using Skeleton.rec with s_left s_right IH_left IH_right
  <;> match leaf_data_tree with
  | LeafData.leaf a =>
    unfold buildMerkleTree
    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
    <;> rfl
  | LeafData.internal left right =>
    unfold buildMerkleTree
    simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, IH_left, IH_right, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, prod.mk.injEq])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, IH_left, IH_right, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      }
    )

have h₁ : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree) : α) = (buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) : FullData α s).root := by
    induction s with
    | leaf =>
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        unfold buildMerkleTree buildMerkleTree_with_hash
        <;> simp [runWithOracle]
        <;> rfl
      | _ => contradiction
    | internal s₁ s₂ =>
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.internal left right =>
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try simp_all [Skeleton.IsMatch]) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [FullDatagetRoot, runWithOracle]
          <;> aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [FullData.getRoot, runWithOracle]
          <;> aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [FullData.getRoot, runWithOracle]
          <;> aesop
        })
  simp_all [FullData.getRoot]

have h₁ : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (f : (α × α) → α) (t : LeafData α s),
      runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s t) =
      InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s t (fun (left right : α) => f (left, right)) := by
    intro s
    induction s <;>
    (try simp_all [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash]) <;>
    (try simp_all [runWithOracle_seq, runWithOracle_pure, InductiveMerkleTree.singleHash]) <;>
    (try
      {
        intros f t
        cases t <;>
        simp_all [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash,
          runWithOracle_seq, runWithOracle_pure, InductiveMerkleTree.singleHash]
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        intros f t
        cases t <;>
        simp_all [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash,
          runWithOracle_seq, runWithOracle_pure, InductiveMerkleTree.singleHash]
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        intros f t
        cases t <;>
        simp_all [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash,
          runWithOracle_seq, runWithOracle_pure, InductiveMerkleTree.singleHash]
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Function.comp]
          <;>
          rfl
        })
      })
  have h₂ : runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree) = InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s leaf_data_tree (fun (left right : α) => f (left, right)) := by
    apply h₁
  simp_all [Function.comp]

have h_main : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    induction leaf_data_tree with
    | leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
    | internal s_left s_right left right ih_left ih_right =>
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure,
        Function.comp]
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
          <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
  exact h_main

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree buildMerkleTree_with_hash
      <;> simp [runWithOracle_pure]
      <;> rfl
  | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree buildMerkleTree_with_hash
      <;> simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash]
      <;> congr 1 <;> ext <;> rfl
      <;> rfl

have h_main : ∀ (s skeleton : Skeleton) (data_tree : LeafData α s) (f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)),
    (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree data_tree)) =
      buildMerkleTree_with_hash data_tree fun (left right : α) =>
        (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s skeleton data_tree f
    have h : ∀ (s skeleton : Skeleton) (data_tree : LeafData α s) (f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)),
        (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree data_tree)) =
          buildMerkleTree_with_hash data_tree fun (left right : α) =>
            (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
      intro s
      induction s using Skeleton.recOn with
      | leaf =>
        intro skeleton data_tree f
        -- Base case: leaf skeleton
        match data_tree with
        | LeafData.leaf a =>
          -- If the data_tree is a leaf, then it corresponds to the leaf skeleton
          simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
          <;>
          rfl
        | _ =>
          -- This case is impossible because the skeleton is a leaf, but the data_tree is not
          exfalso
          simp_all [LeafData]
          <;>
          omega
      | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
        intro skeleton data_tree f
        -- Inductive step: internal skeleton
        match data_tree with
        | LeafData.leaf a =>
          -- This case is impossible because the skeleton is internal, but the data_tree is a leaf
          exfalso
          simp_all [LeafData]
          <;>
          omega
        | LeafData.internal left right =>
          -- The data_tree is an internal node with left and right children
          have h₁ := ih_left (Default.skeleton) left f
          have h₂ := ih_right (Default.skeleton) right f
          simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle, singleHash] at h₁ h₂ ⊢
          <;>
          simp_all [runWithOracle]
          <;>
          simp_all [Function.funext_iff, Prod.ext_iff]
          <;>
          try { constructor <;> intro <;> simp_all }
          <;>
          try { aesop }
          <;>
          try { rfl }
          <;>
          try { simp_all [h₁, h₂] }
          <;>
          try { aesop }
          <;>
          try { rfl }
          <;>
          try { simp_all [h₁, h₂] }
          <;>
          try { aesop }
          <;>
          try { rfl }
    exact h s skeleton data_tree f
  have h_final : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    have h₁ := h_main s Default.skeleton leaf_data_tree f
    -- Since we are using the default skeleton, we can use the general result from h_main to get the specific result for the given leaf_data_tree
    have h₂ : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
      simpa using h_main s (s) leaf_data_tree f
    exact h₂
  
  exact h_final

induction s using s.rec3
  <;> match leaf_data_tree with
  | LeafData.leaf a =>
    simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
  | LeafData.internal left right =>
    simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
    <;>
    (try cases s_left <;> cases s_right <;> simp_all [Skeleton.rec3]) <;>
    (try simp_all [singleHash, runWithOracle_bind]) <;>
    (try rw [runWithOracle_bind] at * <;> simp_all)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp, Function.comp_apply]) <;>
    (try rfl) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [singleHash, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;>
        (try cases s_left <;> cases s_right <;> simp_all [Skeleton.rec3]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.comp, Function.comp_apply]) <;>
        (try rfl) <;>
        (try aesop)
      }
    )

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
    | _ => simp_all [LeafData]
  | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_bind, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, Skeleton]
      <;> rfl
    | _ => simp_all [LeafData]

have h₁ : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (t : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree t)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash t (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s
    induction s with
    | leaf =>
      intro t
      match t with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
      | _ => contradiction
    | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
      intro t
      match t with
      | LeafData.internal t_left t_right =>
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle, singleHash, compose]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [BinaryTree.fold, BinaryTree.map]
            <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [FullData.getMerkleRoot]
                <;>
                rfl
              })
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [BinaryTree.fold, BinaryTree.map]
            <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [FullData.getMerkleRoot]
                <;>
                rfl
              })
          })
        <;>
        rfl
      | _ => contradiction
  have h₂ : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩) := h₁ s leaf_data_tree
  simpa using h₂

induction s using Skeleton.induction with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;> rfl
  | internal s_left s_right left_ih right_ih =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      have h₁ := left_ih
      have h₂ := right_ih
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
      <;> congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
      <;> rfl

volume 10000
  induction s using Skeleton.induction with
  | atLeaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
    | _ =>
      simp_all [Skeleton.atLeaf]
  | atInternal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf _ =>
      simp_all [Skeleton.atInternal]
      <;> contradiction
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
      <;> rfl
